title: Tianhui Group won the title of Top 100 Hebei Service Enterprises in 2023
contentHtml:
On April 9, 2024, the 2023 Hebei Top 100 Service Enterprises and Top 50 Innovation Leaders press conference was held grandly at the Taihang State Guesthouse in Shijiazhuang, Hebei.

Tianhui Group was invited to attend the press conference and received the honorary award. This honor is an affirmation of Tianhui Group's comprehensive strength and competitiveness, and also demonstrates the excellent results of transformation, upgrading, and innovative development in recent years.


Base yourself on the present and look to the future. On the way forward, Tianhui Group will always remain true to its original aspirations, adhere to the group culture of "honesty as the basis, peace as the most important, trust first, pioneering and enterprising", and contribute its due strength to local economic development.
titleZh: 天晖集团荣获2023河北服务业企业100强
contentHtmlZh:
2024年4月9日，2023河北服务业企业100强及创新领先50强发布会在河北石家庄太行国宾馆隆重举行。

天晖集团受邀出席了此次发布会，并接受了荣誉授牌。这份荣誉是对天晖集团综合实力与竞争力的一种肯定，也彰显了近年来转型升级、创新发展的优良成果。


立足当下，展望未来。在前行的路上，天晖集团将始终不忘初心，秉承“以诚为本、以和为贵、信义至上、开拓进取”的集团文化，为地方经济发展贡献应有的力量。
